description: Displays a dimensioned measurement indicator showing the distance between two points or along a line, with end markers and an optional centered text label. Supports perpendicular offset positioning for clean diagram layout. Preferred for measuring shapes inside 2D graphs. For measurements outside of 2D graphs (annotation layer), use distancemarker instead.
utility: Create measurement indicator between two points or along a line inside a 2D graph

arguments.name: line or points
arguments.description: Line variable or two points to measure between

arguments.name: text
arguments.description: Label text for measurement (optional, displays length if omitted)

arguments.name: buff
arguments.description: First value: perpendicular offset of entire marker from the referenced edge in model units. Second value: perpendicular offset of label from the marker line in model units.

arguments.name: rot
arguments.description: Label rotation in degrees. Overrides the default auto-rotation that aligns the label with the marker line. Use rot(0) for horizontal labels.

alternates.description: Measurement with label rotated to horizontal

examples.scenario: Measure side a with offset below

examples.expression: edge_measure = measure(graph_1, line(graph_1, item(triangle_1, type(edge), 1), type(segment)), buff(0, -0.5))
